user.title: Create Input Boolean Group
user.description: Choose a name, optional icon and the state evaluation mode for the group.

data_description.mode: How member entity states are combined to determine the group state.

entities.title: Select Entities
entities.description: Pick the input_boolean entities that belong to this group and optionally add automation-style conditions.

data_description.entities: The group is ON based on the selected mode applied to these entities.
data_description.conditions: All conditions must pass for the group to be ON (evaluated after entity states).

union.title: Union — Custom States
union.description: Specify which entities must be ON and which must be OFF. The group is ON only when all constraints are satisfied.

data_description.entities_on: The group is ON only if ALL of these entities are ON.
data_description.entities_off: The group is ON only if ALL of these entities are OFF.
data_description.conditions: All conditions must also pass (evaluated after entity states).

error.no_entities: You must select at least one input_boolean entity.
error.no_union_entities: You must select at least one entity for 'must be ON' or 'must be OFF'.

data_description.mode: How member entity states are combined to determine the group state.

entities.title: Edit Entities
entities.description: Update the member entities and optional conditions.

data_description.entities: The group is ON based on the selected mode applied to these entities.
data_description.conditions: All conditions must pass for the group to be ON (evaluated after entity states).

union.title: Edit Union — Custom States
union.description: Update which entities must be ON and which must be OFF.

data_description.entities_on: The group is ON only if ALL of these entities are ON.
data_description.entities_off: The group is ON only if ALL of these entities are OFF.
data_description.conditions: All conditions must also pass (evaluated after entity states).

error.no_entities: You must select at least one input_boolean entity.
error.no_union_entities: You must select at least one entity for 'must be ON' or 'must be OFF'.
